subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down by the Lord of the worlds for the preservation of nations, which He ordained to be dispatched unto him who hath turned towards the Most Exalted Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مولی العالم لحفظ الامم و اراد ان یرسله الی الذی اقبل الی الافق الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @law of inheritance, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @martyrs and martyrdom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
